'''EUW:''' Krastyel |checkboxAutoTeams=Yes |checkbox2=No |role=Support |issub1=No |istrainee1=No |issub2=No |istrainee2=No |issub3=No |istrainee3=No |issub4=No |istrainee4=No |issub5=No |istrainee5=No |checkbox3=No |stream=https://twitch.tv/ceoslol |facebook=https://www.facebook.com/Ceoslol |twitter=ceoslol01 |instagram=ceoslol |lolpros=https://br.lolpros.gg/player/ceos |deeplol=https://www.deeplol.gg/pro/Ceos |dpmlol=https://dpm.lol/pro/Ceos |checkboxSuppressOrgNavbox=No |checkboxSBS=Yes |checkboxTOCR=No |checkboxIsSub=No |checkbox-res=No |checkboxPrev=No |issub26=No |issub27=No |issub28=No |issub29=No |issub30=No }} ==Biography== '''Ceos''' is from Tatuí, São Paulo state, Brazil. == Trivia == * Started playing League in 2013. * Favorite champions are {{ci|Rakan}} and {{ci|Thresh}}. * Often considered one of the greatests supports in [[CBLOL]]'s history. * Is the first Brazilian player to play in a tier 1 League outside of Brazil after joining [[Shopify Rebellion]] for the [[LTA North 2025 Split 1|LTA North]]. ** He had visa issues in the first split and was replaced by [[Zeyzal]] as an emergency substitute, debuting only in [[LTA North 2025 Split 2|Split 2]]. * His IGN comes from the Greek Titan "Ceos". The inspiration came from his interest in the [[wikipedia:en:Percy Jackson & the Olympians|Percy Jackson book series]]. * His favorite music artist is [[wikipedia:en:Matuê|Matuê]]. * Likes computers and learned programming in school. * Played lots of sports, including basketball, volleyball, and soccer. * Watches F1 since he was a kid; his all-time favorite driver is the Brazilian [[wikipedia:en:Gabriel Bortoleto|Gabriel Bortoleto]]. ** Stopped watching when he started playing League, started again with the release of [[wikipedia:en:Formula 1: Drive to Survive|Drive to Survive]]. * His KR ID refers to a 4-burner stove, as do the [[Robo]] and [[Tinowns]] IDs in Korea refer to other home appliances. * [[Croc]]'s old ID in Brazilian soloqueue, '''"ceos chan"''', references him. * Known for playing {{ci|Xerath}} often in solo queue. {{PlayerStatsTrivia}} ==Individuals Awards== * 1x Craque da Galera Heineken 0.0 (Prêmio CBLOL 2023) [https://ge.globo.com/esports/lol/noticia/2023/11/22/premio-cblol-2023-consagra-ceos-e-loud-veja-vencedores.ghtml Prêmio CBLOL 2023 consagra Ceos e LOUD; veja vencedores] ''ge.globo.com'' * 1x CBLOL Best Support (Prêmio CBLOL 2023) * 1x CBLOL Best Player (Prêmio CBLOL 2023) * 1x Best League of Legends Athlete (Prêmio eSports Brasil 2023) [https://ge.globo.com/esports/premio-esports-brasil/noticia/2023/12/14/premio-esports-brasil-2023-melhor-atleta-lol-ceos.ghtml PeB 2023: Ceos é eleito o melhor jogador de LoL] ''ge.globo.com'' ==Tournament Results== {{PlayerResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerResults1v1|show=overviewpage}} == Media == {{PlayerMedia}} === Images === {{PlayerProfileGallery}} {{PlayerPageEnd}}
